items.title: 구찌, 일부 핸드백 가격 5~8% 인상
items.summary: Gucci Korea raised prices on select handbags effective July 7 by roughly 5-8 percent: the Ophidia Medium GG Tote went from KRW 2.0M to 2.16M (+8%), the Ophidia Small Shoulder Bag from 2.62M to 2.79M (+6.5%), and the Jackie Small Shoulder Bag from 3.9M to 4.1M (about +5%). Framed alongside similar hikes at Celine, Fendi, Dior, Louis Vuitton, Miu Miu and Cartier this year as part of an industry-wide pattern of repeated luxury price increases in Korea.

items.title: グッチ×安藤七宝店コラボ、名古屋ワークショップは7月17-20日開催
items.summary: Gucci's capsule collaboration with Japanese cloisonne-enamel workshop Ando Shippoten, inspired by the traditional craft, launched with items like the Bamboo 1947 bag, small leather goods and scarves referencing kacho-fugetsu (flowers, birds, wind, moon) motifs. Tied to the July 19 "super lucky day" (tenshabi/ichiryu-manbaibi/taian overlap), the Nagoya store hosts an enamel-charm-making workshop with Ando artisans July 17-20, following an earlier Ginza session in late June.

items.title: 「グッチ」の日本限定ウォレット＆レザーグッズ、7月19日の開運日に向け発売
items.summary: Gucci released a new women's small-leather-goods line including Japan-exclusive GG Marmont pieces in soft light-pink and light-blue colorways (zip-around wallets, bifold wallets, card cases, key cases) timed to Japan's July 19 "lucky day" gift-giving custom, with personalization/engraving service offered in stores and online.

items.title: 古驰美妆提前"入列"欧莱雅：27亿交接背后，高端美妆香水赛道再升温
items.summary: L'Oreal and Kering's Gucci Beauty licensing handover moves up a year to July 2027 under a 50-year exclusive deal; L'Oreal absorbs about 70% of early-termination and inventory-transition costs while outgoing licensee Coty receives roughly $400M compensation. Piece flags L'Oreal's China luxury division grew 5.6% in Q1 2026, framing Gucci Beauty as a complementary asset to Lancome/Helena Rubinstein, though an analyst also notes the risk of internal brand overlap.

items.title: GUCCI武汉恒隆广场店关闭，工作人员回应
items.summary: Gucci closed its Wuhan Hengrui (Henglong) Plaza store on May 21 after about four years in operation; staff confirmed the closure via SMS notice and directed customers to two remaining Wuhan locations. Tied to Kering's broader 2026 plan to net-close roughly 100 stores group-wide, with about 40% of closures concentrated in Asia and Gucci accounting for roughly a third, as leadership cites store saturation in Korea, Japan and parts of China.

items.title: 张凌赫登《嘉人》七月刊，Gucci独家推封3小时售罄14万本
items.summary: Gucci China ambassador Zhang Linghe's exclusive Marie Claire China July cover (shot in the brand's 2026 Fall/Winter Primavera collection) sold out its 140,000-copy print run in three hours for over RMB 8.12 million, with fans organizing a Times Square NYC screen tribute. Piece frames it as a commercial-success story but also notes recurring criticism that his styling repeats a "safe" minimalist template.

items.title: 微博网友热议张凌赫嘉人封面与Gucci资源
items.summary: Weibo/Douyin/Xiaohongshu cross-platform sentiment on Zhang Linghe's Gucci-backed magazine push skews over 95% positive per aggregator summaries, but a vocal minority argues the back-to-back top-tier magazine covers reflect traffic-driven resource allocation rather than fashion credibility -- a recurring debate over whether the endorsement is earned in comment threads.

items.title: "구찌 이 지갑 현역임...????" - 지갑 마이너 갤러리 스레드
items.summary: Korean men's-wallet community thread debating whether an older Gucci wallet model is still "current" (worth carrying) versus newer releases, reflecting ongoing forum-level price-versus-value skepticism toward repeated Gucci price hikes among everyday consumers rather than press-driven narratives.

items.source: Kaitori Daikichi (買取大吉, resale/pawn price data)
items.title: グッチ財布の買取相場、Ophidia系で2.5万〜7.5万円
items.summary: Japanese resale/pawn marketplace pricing page shows Gucci wallet buyback rates clustering at JPY 35,000-100,000, with Ophidia-line pieces fetching roughly JPY 25,000 used and up to about JPY 75,000 for unused stock as of a July 2026 transaction example -- a ground-level signal on secondhand demand distinct from retail/press coverage.

items.source: udedokeitoushi.com (腕時計投資.com, market data site)
items.title: グッチ全体の中古相場、直近6カ月は下落基調
items.summary: A Japanese watch/accessory resale-price tracking site reports Gucci's overall secondhand-market average trending downward over the past six months (biggest single-day drop -26.52% on June 5), with the current average around JPY 212,865, down slightly day-over-day -- though vintage "old Gucci" pieces are noted as bucking the trend with rising values.
